positive: A minimalist and stylized depiction of celestial flora and fauna. Featuring bioluminescent glowing flowers, stylized crescent moons, and deep-space nebula elements woven into a continuous, intricate pattern. The style is neo-art deco combined with sacred geometry, rendered in strong, contrasting silhouettes of emerald green, deep indigo, and brilliant gold accents. Composition must be perfectly centered, highly symmetrical, and designed to look excellent as a repeating textile pattern. Clean, crisp lines, high contrast, vector art quality, graphic design print, flat lay perspective, maximum detail, 8k resolution, editorial quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, low contrast, artifacts, deformed, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, poorly drawn, bokeh, gradient fade, realistic photography, grayscale, disfigured, bad anatomy
